targets.rawSql:
SELECT dateadd(hh, -9, CollectDTM) as time
     , Z.ServerHost
     , ROUND((1-(Z.Rsrc_Val/(Memory_GB*1024*1024*1024)))*100,2) Rsrc_Val
  FROM [dbo].[TB_Rds_Rsrc_L] Z, [dbo].[TB_Rds_Comm_Info_M] A,  [dbo].[TB_Rds_Class_Info_M] B
 WHERE 1=1 
  -- AND Z.CollectDT = CONVERT(VARCHAR, GETDATE(), 112)
   AND a.VPC IN ($VPC)
   AND a.ServerHost IN ($ServerHost)
   AND Rsrc_Name = 'FreeableMemory'
  -- AND $__timeFilter(CollectDTM)
  -- AND CollectDTM BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
   AND CollectDTM BETWEEN dateadd(hh, 9, convert(datetime,$__timeFrom())) AND dateadd(hh, 9, convert(datetime,$__timeTo()))
   -- 
   AND A.ServerClass = B.ServerClass
   AND Z.ServerHost = A.ServerHost
ORDER BY time
